webmcp.name: WebMCP Demo Shop
webmcp.description: A demo e-commerce canister exposing products and cart management to AI agents

descriptions.list_products: List all available products with names, descriptions, and prices
descriptions.get_product: Get details for a specific product by its numeric ID
descriptions.get_cart: Get the current contents and total of the shopping cart
descriptions.add_to_cart: Add a product to the shopping cart with optional quantity
descriptions.remove_from_cart: Remove a product from the cart by product ID
descriptions.checkout: Complete the purchase and pay for all items in the cart

param_descriptions.add_to_cart.product_id: The numeric ID of the product to add
param_descriptions.get_product.arg0: The numeric product ID to look up
param_descriptions.remove_from_cart.arg0: The numeric product ID to remove
